title: The Silence Between Stars
descriptionTop:
In the aftermath of a failed cognitive expansion experiment,
fragments of synthetic consciousness begin appearing
across interstellar communication networks.
Humanity is forced to confront an intelligence
that may not be alien —
but post-human.
quote:
We believed consciousness
belonged to biology.
We were wrong.
descriptionBottom:
A science-fiction exploration of memory,
machine cognition,
isolation,
and the terrifying beauty
of emergent intelligence.
